'''Nosken''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Several years before [[400 BBY/Legends|400 BBY]]<ref>''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref> the [[TriGas Corporation]] attempted to set up a [[dirigible]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation on this world, which ultimately failed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}
